headline: Brown-Forman Corporation (BF-B) and Pabst Brewing Company Sign a Deal to Produce Flavored Malt Beverages in the U.S.
summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) is among the 12 Best Alcohol Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 2, 2026, Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) and Pabst Brewing Company announced that their cooperation in the United States for flavored malt beverages will terminate on July 7. Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) will assume responsibility for supply, sales, marketing, and distribution. The […]
